title: galium scabrum subsp. nitidulum
intro: Galium scabrum subsp. nitidulum, also known as the shiny bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium scabrum plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which are beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Galium scabrum subsp. nitidulum include its ability to reduce swelling, soothe skin irritations, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes.
